name: Wraith King
description: Purer than flesh, stronger than bone, imperishable is the essence of the wraith.

abilities.name: Vampiric Spirit
abilities.description: Grants Wraith King and his Skeleton Warriors' attacks lifesteal. Wraithfire Blast of the corresponding level fully replaces the slow component upon a Reincarnation proc, with a slower projectile speed when off-cooldown.

abilities.name: Wraithfire Blast
abilities.description: Sears an enemy unit with a spectral fire projectile that stuns and damages on hit, then slows and damages over time. Wraithfire Blast of the corresponding level fully replaces the Reincarnation ability slow component upon proc, with a slower projectile speed.

abilities.name: Bone Guard
abilities.description: Wraith King's blade drains his enemy's essence to feed his aura. This unit's attacks are less effective on units. Affects the total attack damage value.

abilities.name: Mortal Strike
abilities.description: Passively deals critical damage on an attack with a cooldown. Grants self outgoing attack damage bonus while Wraith Form is active, and while Mortal Strike is off cooldown.

abilities.name: Reincarnation
abilities.description: The Wraith King reforms after death, allowing him to resurrect when killed in battle. Applies a movement speed slow and an attack speed slow upon death to enemy heroes within the radius when off-cooldown. Wraithfire Blast of the corresponding level fully replaces the slow component upon a Reincarnation proc, with a slower projectile speed when off-cooldown.
